message:
test(workflows): add serde roundtrip and edge case tests for runner types

Add 5 tests for workflow runner types:

- WorkflowExecutionResult: serde roundtrip for PolicyDenied, Error
  (with/without execution_id) variants
- AbortResult: full-field serialization verification with all fields
  populated and None-field omission
- WorkflowRunnerConfig: custom value construction test

Runner tests: 23 (was 18).

Build: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-tansummit-target --no-default-features
All 23 pass (0.01s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
